summary: EXP-402 supplies a single-patch replacement for the directional sentence in WIN-053.detail_evidence paragraph 1. Closes WIN-053.c5 H7 (still open from c4 H7 / c3 H5). Adds explicit monopole-pair-vs-dipole topological framing + Maxwell ∇·B = 0 grounding to an argument that was already structurally present but lacked the curmudgeon-recommended terminology. review_class=verification (override from tracker deep-attack, see EXP review_class_override_note). After patch lands, WIN-053.c5 should be fully closed (H1-H6 and H8-H9 already addressed per current-text audit; H7 was the lone outstanding item).
